snippet.title: Chan Chun Sing on whether he is next in line to be Singapore's prime minister
snippet.description:
With DPM Heng Swee Keat having taken himself out of the running as Singapore's prime minister, his deputy, Chan Chun Sing, was asked if he was next in line.

"Now that DPM has decided to step aside as leader of the 4G, the 4G team should be given the opportunity to relook the question of succession holistically, and we will make a collective decision on who will be the next leader of the 4G in due course," Mr Chan said in response. https://cna.asia/3uvIZAq

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who‚Äôs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it‚Äôs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing‚Äôs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor‚Äôs Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for ‚ÄúMr. Perfectly Fine‚Äù (Taylor‚Äôs Version) (From The Vault) ‚Äì off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor‚Äôs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. I‚Äôve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But it‚Äôs wonderful to see that you‚Äôre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
How‚Äôs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I‚Äôve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And you‚Äôre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesn‚Äôt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess you‚Äôre all the same
Because I hear he‚Äôs got his arm ‚Äòround a brand new girl
I‚Äôve been picking up my heart
He‚Äôs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But it‚Äôs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It‚Äôs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he‚Äôs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it‚Äôs really such a shame
It‚Äôs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I‚Äôm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you‚Äôll miss me
But by then you‚Äôll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How‚Äôs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I‚Äôve been Miss misery for the last time
And you‚Äôre Mr. perfectly fine
You‚Äôre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.title: Singapore leadership succession: Heng Swee Keat explains why he is stepping down as 4G team leader
snippet.description:
Singapore Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat will step aside as the leader of the fourth-generation People's Action Party (PAP) leadership team, taking himself out of running as Singapore's next prime minister, he announced on Thursday (Apr 8).

Noting that he would be in his mid-60s by the time the COVID-19 crisis is over, Mr Heng said: "While I am in good health today, it is in the best interests of the nation for someone who is younger to tackle the huge challenges ahead." https://cna.asia/3wLKhJJ

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her household‚Äôs most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular ‚Äì a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing ‚Äúappropriate‚Äù engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the Queen‚Äôs deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Highlights | Manchester City 1-2 Leeds United | Premier League
snippet.description:
Manchester City lost for only the fourth time this season as Stuart Dallas‚Äô stoppage time winner ensured 10-man Leeds United stunned the Premier League leaders at the Etihad Stadium.

Dallas gave Marcelo Bielsa‚Äôs side the lead against the run of play when he fired a low 18-yard drive in off the post shortly before half-time, but the game appeared to swing back in City‚Äôs favour when Liam Cooper was dismissed for a reckless tackle on Gabriel Jesus in first half added time.

Pep Guardiola‚Äôs men were in total control after the break as Leeds tried to protect their lead, but Ferran Torres looked to have rescued a point when he steered Bernardo Silva‚Äôs pass into the bottom corner in the 76th minute.

City continued to pour forward in search of a winner, but were undone by a slick counter-attack when Dallas latched onto Ezgjan Alioski‚Äôs through ball and nutmegged Ederson to seal a smash and grab victory in the 91st minute.

The defeat leaves Guardiola‚Äôs men needing 11-points from our remaining six league games to be crowned champions.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/man-city-leeds-united-premier-league-match-report-10-april-63753640

snippet.description:

snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa‚Äã #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun‚Äã #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika‚Äã #Faasil #Sukumar‚Äã #DSP #MythriMovieMakers‚Äã 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It‚Äôs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It‚Äôs a vicious cycle.

ŸÄŸÄŸÄŸÄŸÄ

As a spring ritual after the new year, I‚Äôve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.

snippet.title: Tearful Charles & Camilla look at flowers and a mini Land Rover for Prince Philip
snippet.description:
A TEARFUL Prince Charles and Camilla today gazed over flowers and even a mini Land Rover tribute laid in honour for Philip. 

Thousands of floral tributes have been left for the Duke of Edinburgh after he passed away aged 99 - with the messages of condolences gathered at Marlborough House.

The flowers and tributes had been left outside both Windsor Castle and Buckingham Palace, but gently moved to a private area to stop crowds gathering over Covid concerns.

And Prince Charles today appeared reflective as he looked over the sea of flowers in honour of his father the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales was pictured looking at the sincere tributes - which have flooded in from people across the country and the globe.

Continue reading
Tearful Prince Charles and Camilla look at flowers and a mini Land Rover laid by mourners in honour of Philip
https://www.thesun.co.uk/news/uknews/14655868/prince-charles-camilla-tearful-flowers-prince-philip/

en-GB.description:
A TEARFUL Prince Charles and Camilla today gazed over flowers and even a mini Land Rover tribute laid in honour for Philip. 

Thousands of floral tributes have been left for the Duke of Edinburgh after he passed away aged 99 - with the messages of condolences gathered at Marlborough House.

The flowers and tributes had been left outside both Windsor Castle and Buckingham Palace, but gently moved to a private area to stop crowds gathering over Covid concerns.

And Prince Charles today appeared reflective as he looked over the sea of flowers in honour of his father the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales was pictured looking at the sincere tributes - which have flooded in from people across the country and the globe.

Continue reading
Tearful Prince Charles and Camilla look at flowers and a mini Land Rover laid by mourners in honour of Philip
https://www.thesun.co.uk/news/uknews/14655868/prince-charles-camilla-tearful-flowers-prince-philip/

snippet.title: Woman Becomes Third Wheel In Her Cat And Husband's Relationship | The Dodo Cat Crazy
snippet.description:
Sponsored by BLUE Tastefuls.

Lindsey found baby Roswell underneath a shed and decided to take him in to live with her then-boyfriend Drew. Drew and Lindsey soon got married, but they weren't the only two falling in love -- Roswell fell in love with Drew, too! Now, Lindsey is stuck in the middle of Drew and Roswell's love affair, even though she was the one to introduce the two!

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

SUBSCRIBE! http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=mancity

http://www.mancity.com
http://www.facebook.com/mancity
http://www.twitter.com/mancity
http://www.instagram.com/mancity
https://www.snapchat.com/add/mancityofficial

About the Official Man City YouTube Channel:

Here you will find all the latest videos from Manchester City, including, all Premier League goals, highlights, behind-the-scenes footage, training and much more.

Get closer to the likes of Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, Gabriel Jesus, Raheem Sterling, Riyad Mahrez, Benjamin Mendy and the rest of Pep Guardiola's team.

snippet.title: Police officer fired for pepper-spraying Black and Latino lieutenant during traffic stop
snippet.description:
Bodycam and cellphone video shows how a Virginia officer pepper-sprayed a Black and Latino Army lieutenant during a traffic stop in December. Christina Ruffini reports on the details of the stop and the lawsuit against the officers.

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs.

snippet.title: Why there won't be any military uniforms worn at Prince Philip's funeral | ITV News
snippet.description:
None of the Queen‚Äôs children or grandchildren will wear their military uniforms at Prince Philip‚Äôs funeral on Saturday.

The decision had been made to avoid any embarrassment which could overshadow the funeral which will take place at Windsor Castle.

The wearing of military uniforms became an issue following Prince Andrew‚Äôs decision to relinquish his royal role in 2019 over his former friendship with the convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

snippet.title: PSG 0-1 Bayern Munich | Champions League 20/21 Match Highlights
snippet.description:
PSG 0-1 Bayern Munich | Champions League 20/21 Match Highlights, Tuesday, April 13, 2021.

Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting's goal gave the visitors hope but Mauricio Pochettino's men clung on to progress. Paris made amends for last season's final defeat by eliminating holders Bayern in a nerve-shredding night at the Parc des Princes.

snippet.title: Gun salutes planned across UK in tribute to Prince Philip @BBC News live üî¥ BBC
snippet.description:

Gun salutes to mark the death of the Duke of Edinburgh are due to take place later across the UK, in Gibraltar and from warships at sea.

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband of 73 years, died on Friday.

Aged 99, he was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

snippet.title: Major Teaser | Telugu | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu | Sashi Tikka
snippet.description:
#Major Telugu Teaser. Major, an Indian film, releasing in Telugu, Hindi and Malayalam is produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 

‚ÄòThe film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.‚Äô 

#MajorTeaser #MajorTheFilm #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Starring: Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma
Produced by: Sony Pictures Films India, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu DIalogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music: Sri Charan Pakala
Editing: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu), Ritesh Rajwada (Hindi)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Additional Action Choreography: Naba-Subbu
Hindi Dialogue: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Malayalam Dialogue: Yedhu-Abhijith M
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Direction Team: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi, Narendra Gautam Varma, Dinesh Jajula, Anurag Mudiganti, Balu Manoj D
DI, VFX and Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Technical Head: CV Rao
Colorist: Vishnu Vardhan K
VFX Supervisor: Venkateshwar Allagadda

Sound Mix: Krishnaraj Arumugam

snippet.description:

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn‚Äôt have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here‚Äôs to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series.

snippet.title: Tiger Mums And Asian Parent Things - Real Talk Season 2 Episode 19 (ft. Annette Lee)
snippet.description:
What were some common Asian things that your parents did to discipline you?

In this episode, the cast sits down with special guest Annette Lee to talk about the crazy ways we were brought up by our parents and the kind of parents we think we will be.

snippet.title: üî¥ [Watch in HD] ONE On TNT II
snippet.description:
The biggest month in ONE Championship history continues on Thursday, 15 April, as ONE on TNT II airs right here on YouTube at 8:30 a.m. SGT (some regions excluded).
 
In the main event, reigning ONE Lightweight World Champion Christian Lee defends his belt against dangerous knockout artist Timofey Nastyukhin!
 
In the co-main event, ONE Atomweight Kickboxing World Champion Janet Todd continues her quest for two-sport gold, as she faces #3-ranked atomweight Muay Thai contender Anne Line Hogstad in "the art of eight limb" while wearing smaller mixed martial arts gloves!
 
They are joined on this explosive card by Japanese stars Yoshiki Nakahara and Shuya Kamikubo, Mongolian knockout artist Shinechagtga Zoltsetseg, South Korean slugger Kim Kyu Sung, and MORE!
 
Check out the full card for the tape-delayed event below, and make sure you tune in right here on YouTube!
 
MAIN CARD:
 
Lightweight World Championship
Christian Lee vs. Timofey Nastyukhin
 
Women's Atomweight Muay Thai
Janet Todd vs. Anne Line Hogstad
 
LEAD CARD:
 
Featherweight Mixed Martial Arts
Shinechagtga Zoltsetseg vs. Yoshiki Nakahara
 
Flyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Kim Kyu Sung vs. Wang Shuo
 
Bantamweight Mixed Martial Arts
Mitchell Chamale vs. Shuya Kamikubo

#ONEonTNT2 #ONEChampionship

snippet.title: Queen Decides Royals Will Not Wear Military Uniform at Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
snippet.description:
'Queen Decides Royals Will Not Wear Military Uniform at Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral'

The Royal Family will not wear military uniform at the Duke of Edinburgh‚Äôs funeral.

The Queen has decided that senior royals should attend the service in mourning dress.

It means Prince Harry will not have to face being one of the only members not in uniform.

Harry lost his honorary military titles after deciding to step down as a senior working royal.

The attendance of Prince Andrew - an honorary Vice Admiral ‚Äì in Royal Navy uniform would also have raised issues, after he relinquished senior royal duties in 2019.

The decision is a break with tradition for ceremonial royal funerals and will contrast with the strong military presence which will be on show to honour Philip.

#PrincePhilip #DukeOfEdinburgh #TheQueen

snippet.title: How I Cooked 25 Pounds Of Potatoes
snippet.description:
With a surplus of potatoes from another recent video, Andrew embarks on trying various potato dishes for the first time in an effort to use up the lot. "Pommes Voyage."





About To Eat: A new YouTube channel from your internet food friends.
About To Eat is the excitement of knowing something wonderful is coming.
-Inga, Andrew, Adam, Annie, Liza, Alvin, Rie, Jody (and more)

Follow us on Instagram:
http://instagram.com/abouttoeat

Check out some of our friends at BuzzFeed:

https://www.youtube.com/buzzfeedtasty

mk.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
mk.description:
„Äêsubscribe„Äë‚Üíhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series ‚ÄúUltraman Trigger‚Äù was conceived as a homage to ‚ÄúUltraman Tiga‚Äù, the first of the three beloved late 90‚Äôs ‚ÄúTDG‚Äù series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core ‚ÄúTiga‚Äù story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of ‚Äúwanting to make everyone smile‚Äù at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

‚òÖSTORY‚Üì
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to time‚Ä¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, Kengo‚Äôs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will Kengo‚Äôs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

‚ñºFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
‚òÜUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

Emulating the core ‚ÄúTiga‚Äù story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of ‚Äúwanting to make everyone smile‚Äù at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

‚òÖSTORY‚Üì
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to time‚Ä¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, Kengo‚Äôs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will Kengo‚Äôs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

‚ñºFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
‚òÜUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

sv.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
sv.description:
„Äêsubscribe„Äë‚Üíhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series ‚ÄúUltraman Trigger‚Äù was conceived as a homage to ‚ÄúUltraman Tiga‚Äù, the first of the three beloved late 90‚Äôs ‚ÄúTDG‚Äù series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core ‚ÄúTiga‚Äù story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of ‚Äúwanting to make everyone smile‚Äù at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

‚òÖSTORY‚Üì
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to time‚Ä¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, Kengo‚Äôs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will Kengo‚Äôs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

‚ñºFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
‚òÜUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

The new TV series ‚ÄúUltraman Trigger‚Äù was conceived as a homage to ‚ÄúUltraman Tiga‚Äù, the first of the three beloved late 90‚Äôs ‚ÄúTDG‚Äù series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core ‚ÄúTiga‚Äù story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of ‚Äúwanting to make everyone smile‚Äù at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

‚òÖSTORY‚Üì
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to time‚Ä¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, Kengo‚Äôs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will Kengo‚Äôs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

‚ñºFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
‚òÜUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

#UltramanTrigger #UltramanTiga

am.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
am.description:
„Äêsubscribe„Äë‚Üíhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series ‚ÄúUltraman Trigger‚Äù was conceived as a homage to ‚ÄúUltraman Tiga‚Äù, the first of the three beloved late 90‚Äôs ‚ÄúTDG‚Äù series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core ‚ÄúTiga‚Äù story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of ‚Äúwanting to make everyone smile‚Äù at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

‚òÖSTORY‚Üì
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to time‚Ä¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, Kengo‚Äôs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will Kengo‚Äôs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

‚ñºFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
‚òÜUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

#UltramanTrigger #UltramanTiga

lv.title: Ultraman Trigger: New Generation Tiga | Official Teaser | The Ultra-Ancient Giant Revives this July!
lv.description:
„Äêsubscribe„Äë‚Üíhttp://m-78.jp/ultrach/
Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/TsuburayaGlobal/
Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tsuburayaglobal
Official Global Tsuburaya Website: https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/
Official North American ULTRAMAN Website: https://ultramangalaxy.com/
Official Series Website (Japanese): http://ani.tv/ultraman_trigger/
Official ULTRAMAN Website (Japanese): https://m-78.jp/trigger/

The new TV series ‚ÄúUltraman Trigger‚Äù was conceived as a homage to ‚ÄúUltraman Tiga‚Äù, the first of the three beloved late 90‚Äôs ‚ÄúTDG‚Äù series (Ultraman Tiga, Dyna, and Gaia), and which celebrates its 25th broadcasting anniversary this year. Emulating the core ‚ÄúTiga‚Äù story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of ‚Äúwanting to make everyone smile‚Äù at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

‚òÖSTORY‚Üì
30 million years ago, the world was engulfed in terrifying darkness.
But that darkness was sealed deep into space by the Giant of Light.
His power spent, the Giant of Light sleeps in the red star,
and is forgotten to time‚Ä¶
The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, Kengo‚Äôs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will Kengo‚Äôs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

‚ñºFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

------------------------------------------------------------
‚òÜUltraman Trigger Series Overview
Start Date: July 10th (Sat), 2021
Broadcast Time: Every Saturday 9:00~9:30am (JST)
Broadcast Channel: TXN Network and others
Production Companies: Tsuburaya Productions, TV Tokyo, and Dentsu
Actors: Raiga Terasaka and others
------------------------------------------------------------

The Terrestrial Peaceable Union hurries to gather an expert team GUTS-SELECT, while Kengo Manaka lives peacefully on now-colonized mars as a Botanist.
However, his peaceful life suddenly comes to an end one fateful day.
The darkness that the ancient civilization sealed away breathes once more!
As a monster bears down on the Martian settlement, Kengo‚Äôs fate leads him to a chance encounter. 
A chance encounter with none-other than the sleeping Giant of Light.
How will Kengo‚Äôs meeting with the Giant of Light influence his destiny, and the destiny of Earth?
The Giant of Light is reborn after an eternity. His name, Ultraman Trigger!

‚ñºFor more information, please visit here!
https://en.tsuburaya-prod.co.jp/news/2583

Emulating the core ‚ÄúTiga‚Äù story elements, Ultraman Trigger can be considered a new generation Tiga with a brand new story.  
It welcomes Tokusatsu genre veteran Koichi Sakamoto as the main director, and with the motto of ‚Äúwanting to make everyone smile‚Äù at its core, Tsuburaya will deliver a series which will bring back the excitement felt by childhood fans of Tiga into present day.

snippet.title: Steph Curry HISTORIC Performance Posting 42 PTS & 11 3PM! üî•
snippet.description:
Steph with 42 PTS in 3 Qs with 0 turnovers tonight, including 25 PTS in the 3rd Q on a perfect 8-for-8 from the field. He is the ONLY player in NBA history to have multiple back-to-back games with 10 3PM. Since individual turnovers have been tracked (1977-78), this is the 4th instance where a player has recorded 40+ points and 10+ threes with 0 turnovers.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Sheffield United vs Arsenal (0-3) | Premier League | Lacazette, Martinelli
snippet.description:
Alexandre Lacazette claimed his 50th Premier League goal as we returned to winning ways in convincing fashion at Bramall Lane.

The Frenchman opened the scoring with his 49th in the competition - applying the finishing touch to a wonderful team move - before sealing the win late on with goal number 50, tucking home Thomas Partey's excellent throughball.

In between those two goals, Gabriel Martinelli scored his first for 15 months, after good work from Nicolas Pepe.

There was a welcome clean sheet as well, as we prepared for Thursday's must-win encounter in Prague in the perfect manner.

The only blot on the evening was an injury to Bukayo Saka, and it was the youngster ‚Äì operating in a free role behind the forwards ‚Äì who had our first attempt, blazing over after bursting into the penalty area.

The hosts were passing the ball nicely themselves though and David McGoldrick fired a shot just wide from the edge of the area in an evenly matched opening quarter of an hour.

But our link-up play up front was much improved from recent weeks, and we soon took control. Saka, Pepe and Martinelli were combing particularly well, while Dani Ceballos was full of nice touches in midfield.

It was one such delightful flick from the Spaniard that set up the opening goal for Lacazette. We worked the ball well outside the area, with Thomas Partey and Saka involved, before Ceballos found Lacazette with a deft touch, and he finished neatly past Aaron Ramsdale. It was a wonderful flowing team goal, and no more than we deserved at that point.

Martinelli had already flashed a couple of efforts wide while Calum Chambers ‚Äì up from full back ‚Äì had seen his low effort blocked by a defender when it seemed destined for the net.

Martinelli himself had a goalbound effort blocked when the ball fell to him from a half-cleared corner.

We were well on top by the break, and should really have been further ahead.

We continued to make chances after the break ‚Äì Lacazette was unable to supply the finishing touch after being set up by Pepe ‚Äì but we didn't look comfortable until the second goal finally came, 20 minutes from time.

It was Pepe who pounced on a loose pass, his low shot was only parried by Ramsdale, and Martinelli was in the right place to tap home his first goal since netting at Stamford Bridge in January 2020.

Lacazette raced through late on and confidently tucked home Partey's pass to bring up his half century - becoming the 10th Arsenal player to the landmark.

Now all thoughts shift to the Europa League.

#arsenal #martinelli #lacazette

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram
Follow us on TikTok: https://arsn.al/tiktok

This is the Official YouTube channel for Arsenal Football Club.

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

Lacazette raced through late on and confidently tucked home Partey's pass to bring up his half century - becoming the 10th Arsenal player to the landmark.

Now all thoughts shift to the Europa League.

en-GB.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Sheffield United vs Arsenal (0-3) | Premier League | Lacazette, Martinelli
en-GB.description:
Alexandre Lacazette claimed his 50th Premier League goal as we returned to winning ways in convincing fashion at Bramall Lane.

The Frenchman opened the scoring with his 49th in the competition - applying the finishing touch to a wonderful team move - before sealing the win late on with goal number 50, tucking home Thomas Partey's excellent throughball.

In between those two goals, Gabriel Martinelli scored his first for 15 months, after good work from Nicolas Pepe.

There was a welcome clean sheet as well, as we prepared for Thursday's must-win encounter in Prague in the perfect manner.

The only blot on the evening was an injury to Bukayo Saka, and it was the youngster ‚Äì operating in a free role behind the forwards ‚Äì who had our first attempt, blazing over after bursting into the penalty area.

The hosts were passing the ball nicely themselves though and David McGoldrick fired a shot just wide from the edge of the area in an evenly matched opening quarter of an hour.

But our link-up play up front was much improved from recent weeks, and we soon took control. Saka, Pepe and Martinelli were combing particularly well, while Dani Ceballos was full of nice touches in midfield.

It was one such delightful flick from the Spaniard that set up the opening goal for Lacazette. We worked the ball well outside the area, with Thomas Partey and Saka involved, before Ceballos found Lacazette with a deft touch, and he finished neatly past Aaron Ramsdale. It was a wonderful flowing team goal, and no more than we deserved at that point.

Martinelli had already flashed a couple of efforts wide while Calum Chambers ‚Äì up from full back ‚Äì had seen his low effort blocked by a defender when it seemed destined for the net.

Martinelli himself had a goalbound effort blocked when the ball fell to him from a half-cleared corner.

We were well on top by the break, and should really have been further ahead.

We continued to make chances after the break ‚Äì Lacazette was unable to supply the finishing touch after being set up by Pepe ‚Äì but we didn't look comfortable until the second goal finally came, 20 minutes from time.

It was Pepe who pounced on a loose pass, his low shot was only parried by Ramsdale, and Martinelli was in the right place to tap home his first goal since netting at Stamford Bridge in January 2020.

Lacazette raced through late on and confidently tucked home Partey's pass to bring up his half century - becoming the 10th Arsenal player to the landmark.

Now all thoughts shift to the Europa League.

#arsenal #martinelli #lacazette

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

snippet.title: EVERTON 1-1 CRYSTAL PALACE | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
James Rodriguez scored on his return to action to put Everton ahead against Crystal Palace, but the Blues were made to pay for missed chances as Michy Batshuayi levelled late on. The game also saw the return of Jean-Philippe Gbamin, who has been sidelined with injury for 597 days.

snippet.title: Royal expert tells Meghan Markle ‚Äòbe quiet‚Äô ahead of Prince Philip's funeral
snippet.description:
A royal expert says Meghan Markle ‚Äúshould be quiet‚Äù following reports the Duchess of Sussex isn‚Äôt attending Prince Philip‚Äôs funeral because she doesn‚Äôt want to the ‚Äúcentre of attention.‚Äù

It comes after the Mail Online reported a friend of Meghan‚Äôs said the Duchess isn‚Äôt attending the funeral to avoid stealing the limelight from Philip.

Angela Levin slammed Ms Markle over the reports-

‚ÄúI think it's astonishing that somebody who has been a member of the Royal Family for a very short time has the audacity to think she is going to be the centre of attention at a funeral of the most extraordinary man of 99 who was the husband of the queen for over 70 years‚Äù, she told the Sun.

"You come and you're very quiet, you sit in the back and wear black as you are told.‚Äù

‚ÄúIf you don't want to be centre of attention then be quiet."

A Buckingham Palace spokesperson confirmed Meghan isn‚Äôt attending the funeral because she is heavily pregnant however the Duchess is yet to confirm.

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her ‚Äòstrength and stay‚Äô | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.‚ÄØ 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the ‚ÄòWidow of Windsor‚Äô.

snippet.title: Prince Harry Preparing to Return to UK for Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Harry is expected to return to the UK for his grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral.

The Duke of Sussex is making preparations to fly back from his US home, though it was unclear whether his wife, Meghan Markle, or son, Archie, would be returning with him.

It is expected the Duke will be buried in Frogmore Gardens, following a small family service at St George's Chapel in the grounds of Windsor Castle. 

#PrinceHarry #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily
tags: duke of edinburgh becomes prince philip
prince harry and william at dianas funeral

snippet.title: HARI BAHHAGIA - ATTA Halilintar & AUREL Hermansyah - ( OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Listen Hari Bahhagia : 
https://lnk.to/HariBahhagia

*
Di sela kesibukannya meyiapkan hari pernikahan, Atta Halilintar dan Aurel Hermansyah membuat kejutan dengan single terbaru mereka berjudul HARI BAHHAGIA. Lagu yang terinspirasi dari kisah perjalanan mereka mulai dari masa bahagia, hingga masa sulit tertuang dalam lagu tersebut.

 ‚ÄúAku kepengin banget menceritakan kisah cinta ini untuk Aurel. Dan kayaknya menyampaikan lewat lagu sudah pas sekali. Awalnya, ini lagu hanya dari aku untuk Aurel, bukan direncanakan untuk duet,‚Äù jelas Atta.

 Memang benar. Awal mula single ini hanyalah ungkapan perasaan bahagia dan syukur Atta, karena akan bersama Aurel dalam ikatan pernikahan. Dan ini tadinya merupakan kado rahasia yang disiapkan Atta untuk Aurel. Ketika Atta memberikan lagu itu untuk Aurel untuk di dengarkan, ia pun ingin berduet menyanyikannya bareng dengan Atta. Alhasil, lagu yang sudah jadi pun dirombak sebagai lagu duet.

*
Credit Music :
Song Producer : Atta Halilintar
Song composer : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Leztey
Aranger : Leztey
Music & Lyric : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Leztey
Vocal Directed by : Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Metha Zulia
Vocal Recorded at : Atta Music Studio
Vocal Audio Angineered by : Leztey
Mixed & Mastered : Leztey

*
Credit Music Video : 
Executive Producer : Atta Halilintar
Produced by : Satria Kinayungan
Directed by : Upie Guava
Co-Director by : Tb Elvan
Edited by : Upie Guava, Tb Elvan
Gaffer by : Wan Black

*
Outfits: Valentino, Marks and Spencer, Julianto, SAS designs
Accessories: Rinaldy Yunardi
Fashion Stylist: Erich Al Amin

snippet.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu ‚ÄúHampa Hatiku‚Äù (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

‚ÄúLagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,‚Äù ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

‚ÄúSemua orang bisa menyanyikan ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,‚Äù kata Lesti. 

‚ÄúDalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,‚Äù jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

‚ÄúKolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan ‚ÄúBismillah Cinta‚Äù,‚Äù ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

BISMILLAH CINTA (LIRIK)
TAK DAPAT LAGI KULUKIS RASA
RAMADHAN YANG INDAH KINI TLAH TIBA
BULAN PENUH BERKAH RAHMAT DARI ALLAH
MESKI DALAM SUASANA BERBEDA

COBAAN DEMI COBAAN MELANDA
KITA BERSAMA NAMUN TAK LAGI SMA
JARAK MEMISAHKAN SEMUA TLAH BERBATAS
INI UJIAN BAGI KITA

BISMILLAH CINTA
PERCAYA PADAKU PERCAYA CINTA
YAKIN KITA BISA LALUI SEMUA
SGALA COBAAN YANG DATANG MENDERA

BISMILLAH CINTA
PANJATKAN DOA PADA YANG KUASA
BERSUJUD PADANYA DENGAN AIR MATA
INSYAALLAH RAMADHAN MEMBAWA HIKMAT

snippet.title: Watch live: The Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, has died
snippet.description:
Buckingham Palace has announced that His Royal Highness Prince Philip has died.

The Duke was married to Queen Elizabeth II for more than 70 years and became the longest-serving consort in British history.

His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle.

Read more here:
https://news.sky.com/story/northern-ireland-ministers-condemn-deplorable-violence-following-emergency-meeting-12269214

Episode 02 : Cell Phone
Episode Summary : 
Feeling sorry for the homeless Sayu, Yoshida decides to have her stay in his house within condition she does household chores for him. They continue to live together awkwardly but somehow comfortably. During a holiday and on the way to the groceries, Yoshida notices that Sayu does not have a cell phone. When he asks her why, she refrains from answering with an uncomfortable smile.

snippet.title: ýÆ∞ýÆæýÆú ýÆµýÆøýÆ∞ýØÅýÆ®ýØçýÆ§ýØÅ - 76 Items in One Leaf for ‚Çπ700 at Raja Bhogam | Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#RajaBhogam #UnlimitedFeast #irfansview 

Raja Bhogam is a restaurant which was known as Carnival, they have changed their name to most famous feast of them. Now they give 76 items in a huge banana leaf for rupees 700, all the items which is served is unlimited. They serve varieties of items in Veg and Non-Veg too. From starters to dessert they are just giving varieties. The taste of each dish was really amazing. It was really a king feast, and I really enjoyed the feast.

snippet.title: I am a Teacher - Official Short Film
snippet.description:
After getting fired from the academy, Madam Soot Beng is forced to find a new job or risk losing everything important to her; even if it means she has to stop doing what she loves, teaching. 
Behind the scenes: https://youtu.be/SBVOtXWvMWw
'Never Falling' MV: https://youtu.be/9R99CaGVKwk

Follow me on Instagram for latest updates: http://www.instagram.com/thejianhaotan
Join the channel membership to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGwcH4qnJ2qM_ZJUSFcAMAA/join

I am a Teacher.
Written and Directed by JianHao Tan
Produced by Titan Studios
Executive Producer: JianHao Tan
Starring: Amander Liew, Vicky Low, Alex Lee, Keith Lee, Valerie Tan, Sherly Devonne Ng, Lewis Loo, Mandy Leong, Louise E. Donaghey
Director of Photography: Nurhakim Suhaimi
Edited by: Nurhakim Suhaimi
Music by: Daniel Veerapen
Post Production Sound Service by Deroma Productions
Original music "Never Falling" performed by AmanderSings

Get your merch now: http://www.teamtitanstore.com 

Titan Digital Media: 
http://www.titandigitalmedia.com

snippet.title: Prince Philip has died aged 99 @BBC News live üî¥ BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and üîî to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube üëâ https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer üëâ https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband, has died aged 99, Buckingham Palace has announced.

The prince married Princess Elizabeth in 1947, five years before she became Queen, and was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

A statement from Buckingham Palace said: "It is with deep sorrow that Her Majesty The Queen has announced the death of her beloved husband, His Royal Highness The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh.

"His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle."

Follow the story üëâ https://bbc.in/3fYe0J5

snippet.title: Security Council Arria formula meeting on Myanmar
snippet.description:
On 1 February, Myanmar‚Äôs military launched a coup that halted abruptly the country‚Äôs democratic transition. The military prevented the convening of the democratically elected parliament and arbitrarily detained the country‚Äôs civilian leaders, including State Counsellor Aung San Suu Kyi and President Win Myint. The reaction of the people of Myanmar has been resolute ‚Äì hundreds of thousands of peaceful protesters have taken to the streets to demand that the outcome of November‚Äôs election is respected and to call for the reversal of the coup.

The Arria meeting provides a platform for Myanmar voices to brief the Security Council on the current situation from their perspectives and those of the people that they represent. It will be an opportunity to understand the objectives of the pro-democracy movement, including the 31 March Federal Democracy Charter and the movement‚Äôs ongoing engagement with ethnic groups and religious minorities.

snippet.title: Meet Some Of The Last Papyrus Makers In Egypt Keeping A 5,000-Year-Old Craft Alive | Still Standing
snippet.description:
Papyrus paper originated in ancient Egypt. Today, just one village still makes the paper, but after a year without tourists, workers are struggling to keep their doors open.

Saied and Atef sell their products locally in Egypt.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy ‚Äì Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max ‚Äì July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie‚Äã
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/‚Äã
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/‚Äã
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy,‚Äù from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.‚Äôs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you‚Äôve never seen them before.  It‚Äôs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron‚Äôs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even ‚ÄúKing‚Äù James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the ‚ÄúAvengers‚Äù films, ‚ÄúHotel Rwanda‚Äù), Khris Davis (‚ÄúJudas and the Black Messiah,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúAtlanta‚Äù), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Walking Dead,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Trek: Discovery‚Äù), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), Eric Bauza (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), and Zendaya (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚Äù ‚ÄúMalcolm & Marie‚Äù).

Lee (‚ÄúGirls Trip,‚Äù ‚ÄúNight School‚Äù) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film‚Äôs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Homecoming‚Äù), animation producer Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúWonder Park‚Äù), production designers Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúThe Mule‚Äù), Akin McKenzie (Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhen They See Us‚Äù) and Clint Wallace (upcoming ‚ÄúEternals‚Äù), editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Wars Episode VIII ‚Äì The Last Jedi‚Äù) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (‚ÄúRampage,‚Äù ‚ÄúWar for the Planet of the Apes‚Äù).  The music is by Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreenbook,‚Äù Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúBridgerton‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy.‚Äù  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh and consort to the Queen, dies aged 99 | ABC News
snippet.description:
Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh and consort to his wife Queen Elizabeth II for more than 60 years, has died at the age of 99.  The Duke suffered ailing health in recent years and retired from royal duties in 2017. Subscribe: http://ab.co/1svxLVE 

ABC News provides around the clock coverage of news events as they break in Australia and abroad, including the latest coronavirus pandemic updates. It's news when you want it, from Australia's most trusted news organisation.

For more from ABC News, click here: https://ab.co/2kxYCZY
Watch more ABC News content ad-free on iview: https://ab.co/2OB7Mk1

Go deeper on our ABC News In-depth channel: https://ab.co/2lNeBn2
Like ABC News on Facebook: http://facebook.com/abcnews.au
Follow ABC News on Instagram: http://instagram.com/abcnews_au
Follow ABC News on Twitter: http://twitter.com/abcnews

#ABCNews #ABCNewsAustralia

Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh and consort to his wife Queen Elizabeth II for more than 60 years, has died at the age of 99.  The Duke suffered ailing health in recent years and retired from royal duties in 2017. Subscribe: http://ab.co/1svxLVE 

ABC News provides around the clock coverage of news events as they break in Australia and abroad, including the latest coronavirus pandemic updates. It's news when you want it, from Australia's most trusted news organisation.

snippet.title: The Demons Baron Battled | Toni Talks
snippet.description: Talking to Baron made me reflect on my own life, the truth is, we all have done things in the past we are not proud of and we wouldn‚Äôt want to see in the headlines. But the beauty of his story is that no matter how many times you messed up your life, God will always love you and will never look at you the way others do.

snippet.title: I Only Made Korean Food For 24 Hours
snippet.description:
From making delicious fried chicken to slurping on a super satisfying bowl of black bean noodles, Inga spends a whole day making only Korean recipes, written by the amazing Maangchi.

Thank you to Maangchi!
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8gFadPgK2r1ndqLI04Xvvw/videos
Website: https://www.maangchi.com/

Follow Inga for more fun food adventures: https://www.instagram.com/ingatylam/

About To Eat: A new YouTube channel from your internet food friends.
About To Eat is the excitement of knowing something wonderful is coming.
-Inga, Andrew, Adam, Annie, Liza, Alvin, Rie, Jody (and more)

Follow us on Instagram:
http://instagram.com/abouttoeat

Check out some of our friends at BuzzFeed:

snippet.title: Gempa Berkekuatan 6,7 Magnitudo Guncang Malang
snippet.description:
Gempa bumi berkekuatan 6,7 skala Richter mengguncang Kabupaten Malang, Jawa Timur, Sabtu (10/4/2021). Episenter gempa berada di laut dengan jarak 90 km arah barat daya dari Kabupaten Malang.

snippet.title: Falcon And The Winter Soldier EPISODE 4 Breakdown & Ending Explained Review | Marvel MCU Easter Eggs
snippet.description:
Falcon And The Winter Soldier EPISODE 4 Breakdown & Ending Explained Review | Marvel MCU Easter Eggs. We review, recap and explain the fourth episode of TFATWS on Disney Plus. This contains easter eggs, theories, spoilers and a breakdown of the events and behind the scenes leaks on the Marvel property. We also discuss where things could be going with Wakanda, US Agent aka John Walker, Bucky, Zemo and Sam of course The Power Broker.

#FalconAndTheWinterSoldier‚Äã #Episode4 #Marvel‚Äã #MCU‚Äã #Breakdown‚Äã #Falcon‚Äã #CaptainAmerica‚Äã #WinterSoldier‚Äã #BuckyBarnes‚Äã #Flagsmasher‚Äã #DisneyPlus #USAgent #Zemo #ThePowerBroker

Falcon And The Winter Soldier is the new Marvel MCU Phase 4 Disney Plus show that follows Captain America's best buddies as they take on Baron Zemo, The Flag Smashers and US Agent. We will be doing weekly breakdowns, trailer reactions, easter egg hunts and discussing the things you missed in our reviews and recaps.

If you enjoyed this video then please subscribe to the channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ?sub_confirmation=1

If You Want To Help Support The Channel So I Can Make More Videos Like This Please Donate Here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ/join

Get some awesome Heavy Spoilers show clothes, phonecases and accessories at - https://teespring.com/en-GB/stores/deffinitions-store

*Check out our BEST new videos below*
*Godzilla Vs Kong Easter Eggs* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abs9qnbQ1K0
*The Walking Dead Season 10 Ending Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S3GBF7IqHBA
*Invincible Episode 4 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r6JSynjpk8g
*Falcon And The Winter Soldier Episode 3 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mfSE64uN4uY
*Godzilla Vs Kong Ending Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WqcLtrAmwXs
*Omni-Man Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=33AtqStgVl8
*Insane Details In Zack Snyder's Justice League* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX6qforbKyI


/* ----- SOCIAL MEDIA ----- */

Follow Me On Social Media At:
https://www.facebook.com/DeffinitionMC/
https://twitter.com/heavyspoilers
https://www.instagram.com/heavyspoilers/


/* ----- VIDEO INFORMATION ----- */

0:00 Falcon And The Winter Soldier Episode 4 Intro
0:26 Captain America The First Avenger Episode 1 Easter Egg
0:44 Episode 3 Recap
1:27 X-Men Easter Egg?
1:58 Episode 4 Breakdown
15:53 Episode 4 Reaction And Review
18:11 Episode 5 Big Character Cameo News

After a thrilling season we're finally getting all of the pieces falling into place and there's a lot of plot theories, easter eggs and things you missed that we're gonna be talking about in this video.

Before that though I just wanna point out an easter egg I got sent by Logan Kelly 13 on instagram who pointed out that in the museum in episode 1 we see a photo of Steve holding the Taxi door with the star on it. If we jump back to Captain America The First Avenger we can actually see the person who took this photo standing in the crowd showing that (it's alllll connected)

It's all connected.

Last week saw Sam and Bucky freeing Zemo in order to track down the origins of the brand new and improved Super Soldier Serum and this led them to Madripoor. After learning it was the Power Broker all along they were reunited with Sharon Carter who seemed more suspicious than Tom Holland trying to keep a secret.

We also got a small clip of Zemo busting out dance moves that would make Star Lord and Justin Hammer evacuate the Dance floor.

Earlier in the week The actor behind him Daniel Bruhl revealed that he actually did a longer dance but that Marvel cut it down and after fans united together and got #ReleaseTheZemoCut trending they dropped an hour long version of it last night.

I sat through the entire thing seventy five times, I don't give a f***

There was also a road sign on the embassy that a lot of people commented saying was a nod to the X-men and I actually drove around throughout the week looking for this on the road. I got the wife to take a photo of it and as you can see...it clearly confirms that the X-men exist in the Heavy Spoilers universe too.

We ended with a cliffhanger and saw that Ayo had been sent from Wakanda to bring Zemo in. Before you could say 'Wakanda sh*t is this) we cut to black...panther's music.

snippet.title: Siti Nurhaliza Hadiahkan Lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU Buat Ernie Zakri & Syamel Walaupun Tengah Sarat
snippet.description:
Majlis resepsi Ernie Zakri dan Syamel sememangnya meriah dengan kehadiran rakan artis dan juga para peminat masing-masing yang sama-sama meraikan hari istimewa pasangan ini.

Selain daripada majlis yang sederhana namun terlihat eksklusif itu, kehadiran penyanyi nombor satu negera, Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang sudah sarat hamil anak kedua juga cukup membuatkan ramai ‚Äòhisteria‚Äô.

Beliau yang hadir bersama suami tercinta, Datuk Seri Khalid Mohd Jiwa dilihat mengenakan busana bewarna merah jambu telah berdiri dan spontan menyanyikan lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU hadiah buat pasangan pengantin. 

Walaupun usia kandungan sudah menghampiri sembilan bulan, suara Tok Ti masih lagi power dan mendapat sorakan daripada semua yang hadir.

Dapat dilihat wajah gembira pasangan Ernie Zakri dan Syamel yang begitu teruja ‚Äòdihadiahkan‚Äô dendangan lagu yang cukup istimewa buat penyanyi kesayangan ramai itu.

Menerusi media sosial, baik di Twitter ataupun di TikTok, kesemuanya memuji penampilan Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang begitu humble dan masih power menyampaikan lagu walaupun sedang sarat hamil anak kedua. #SITINURHALIZA #SYAMELERNIE
